blocks.content: He didn't plan it. He just — moved.
Her hand on his shoulder shifted — fingers against the back of his neck, barely, just there — and he felt it in his whole chest.
Two inches between them now. Then less. The music was still going and the lights were still low.
Her eyes dropped — just briefly, just once — to his mouth. Came back up.
He leaned in. She leaned in. The distance between them went from inches to a breath, and the breath was the only thing left, and Kit thought: this is it, this is actually —
